# Golf View Home

Golf View Home is a residential assisted living facility located in Brentwood, California, offering personalized senior care in a warm and home-like environment. The facility is designed to provide comfort, safety, and quality of life for elderly residents who need daily assistance. The brand conveys trust, compassion, and a family-oriented atmosphere tailored to seniors and their loved ones.

Source: https://www.golf-view-home.com

---

## Discover 24 Hour Care for Seniors in Comfort — Golf View Home

URL: https://www.golf-view-home.com

# Personalized Assisted Living in Brentwood, California


### Warm residential care, safety, and everyday comfort in a home-like environment where seniors thrive with dignity and compassion.


Schedule a Visit
Explore Living & Care















## Why Families Choose a Home-Like Setting



At Golf View Home, we believe that personalized attention and daily support thrive best in a warm, familiar environment. Our approach focuses on preserving dignity and independence while providing the gentle assistance your loved one needs to flourish every day.











### Individualized Assistance


Tailored care plans that adapt to each resident's unique needs, ensuring comfort and safety without compromising independence.











### Safe Residential Environment


A secure, intimate home designed with accessibility in mind, offering peace of mind for families and a familiar setting for residents.











### Warm Companionship


We foster meaningful connections and daily social engagement, creating a family-oriented atmosphere where every resident feels valued and at home.

































## See the Home Through a Family's Eyes


Every corner of Golf View Home is designed to feel like a warm, familiar embrace. From sunlit sitting areas to peaceful bedrooms dressed in soft linens, our residence invites you to imagine your loved one surrounded by comfort, safety, and genuine care.
























Daily life at Golf View Home is filled with small, meaningful moments — shared meals, quiet reading, gentle exercise, and the simple joy of feeling truly at home.














## Trust from families and care partners


Peace of mind comes from knowing your loved one is surrounded by kindness, comfort, and attentive support every day.













"The genuine kindness shown by the staff at Golf View Home made all the difference for our family. Mom feels truly at home here."



— Daughter of Resident
A place built on compassion

— Son of Resident

— Family Care Partner

## Let's Talk About Compassionate Care in Brentwood


Every family deserves clarity and confidence when choosing senior care. Whether you're looking for 24 hour care for seniors or exploring independent living senior care options, our team is here to listen and guide you with warmth and honesty.




Brentwood's trusted residential care home — personalized tours and guidance available daily.

## Elevate Daily Living with Independent Living Senior Care — Golf View Home

URL: https://www.golf-view-home.com/living-care
Description: Explore personalized living and care options blending independent living senior care with daily assistance. A safe, nurturing Brentwood residence designed for your loved one&#39;s comfort and dignity.

Elevate Daily Living with Independent Living Senior Care — Golf View Home






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Living & Care
- About the Residence



Contact











# Daily Living Support & Personalized Care


At Golf View Home, we believe that every senior deserves to live with dignity, comfort, and a sense of belonging. Our assisted living model is built around a family-style environment where residents receive the individualized support they need — whether it's a helping hand with morning routines or gentle encouragement throughout the day — all while enjoying the warmth of a real home in Brentwood.




Assistance with activities of daily living



Compassionate medication management & support



Nutritious, home-cooked meals served family-style



24-hour supervision in a safe, secure environment




















## Compassionate Care & Daily Support



At Golf View Home, we provide personalized assistance tailored to each resident's needs, ensuring comfort, dignity, and a true sense of belonging in our Brentwood family home.








### Bathing & Grooming Assistance


Gentle, respectful support with daily personal hygiene routines, including bathing, dressing, and grooming, helping residents look and feel their best every day.







### Medication Reminders


Carefully managed medication schedules with gentle reminders and supervision, ensuring every resident receives the right dosage at the right time, every time.







### Nutritious Meals


Three home-cooked meals daily plus snacks, prepared with fresh ingredients and tailored to dietary needs, served family-style in our warm dining room.







### Mobility Support


Attentive assistance with walking, transferring, and daily movement, helping residents maintain independence and navigate our home safely and confidently.







### Housekeeping & Laundry


Regular housekeeping and personal laundry service keep living spaces fresh, clean, and comfortable — so residents can focus on what matters most.







### Companionship & Supervision


Warm, attentive companionship throughout the day with caring supervision, engaging conversation, and shared activities that nurture emotional wellbeing.




Schedule a Personal Tour



















## The Difference a Small Residential Setting Makes


At Golf View Home, we believe that familiarity, consistency, and personal attention are the cornerstones of exceptional senior care. Unlike larger institutional facilities, our intimate Brentwood residence allows us to build genuine relationships with each resident, tailoring our 24 hour care for seniors to their unique preferences, routines, and life stories. Here, every day feels like home, not a schedule.








### Lower Resident-to-Caregiver Scale


Our small household model ensures every resident receives more one-on-one time, faster response to needs, and care that adapts as they do.









### A Calmer, More Familiar Environment


Soft textures, natural light, and the rhythm of a real home reduce anxiety and confusion, supporting emotional well-being and cognitive health.









### Family Peace of Mind


Knowing your loved one is in a safe, nurturing space where they are truly known brings a profound sense of relief and confidence to the entire family.















## Everyday stability, personalized around the clock


At Golf View Home, reassurance isn't a promise — it's a daily rhythm. Our approach is built around the simple truth that quality of life comes from feeling safe, known, and supported in every moment.









### Personalized Care Approach


Every resident receives a tailored daily care plan that adapts as needs evolve — from gentle morning routines to evening reassurance checks.








### Home-Style Setting


Our Brentwood residence feels like a private home, not a facility. Shared meals, garden views, and cozy common areas foster genuine belonging.








### Family-Centered Communication


We keep families closely connected with regular updates, open visiting hours, and a dedicated point of contact for every resident's circle of care.








### 24 Hour Care for Seniors


Around-the-clock support means peace of mind for families and consistent safety for residents — whether it's medication management, mobility assistance, or simply a reassuring presence at any hour.






Care at Golf View Home is never one-size-fits-all. We shape every detail — meals, activities, health monitoring — around the individual, so each day feels familiar, dignified, and genuinely comfortable. For families exploring senior housing independent living options that blend autonomy with attentive support, our Brentwood home offers a rare balance of warmth and professional care.













Common Questions

## Frequently Asked Questions About Senior Care


We know that finding the right support for a loved one brings many questions. Here are answers to the topics families ask us most often when considering Golf View Home for assisted living and 24 hour care for seniors.







### Who is assisted living right for?


Assisted living is ideal for seniors who value their independence but need daily support with personal care, medication management, or mobility. If you or a loved one find that managing a household alone has become challenging, our residential setting provides the perfect balance of autonomy and care.




### What does daily support include?


Daily support at Golf View Home is personalized to each resident. It typically includes assistance with bathing, dressing, and grooming, as well as medication reminders, nutritious home-cooked meals, housekeeping, and coordination with healthcare providers. Our goal is to handle the details so residents can enjoy their day.




### How do we discuss care needs with our loved one?


Approach the conversation with empathy and focus on enhancing quality of life rather than a loss of independence. Highlight the benefits of companionship, safety, and freedom from household chores. Our care team is also happy to help families navigate this sensitive discussion with warmth and understanding.




### What is the atmosphere like at Golf View Home?


Our Brentwood residence is designed to feel like a family home, not an institution. With sunlit common areas, a lush garden view, and a calm, caring rhythm to each day, residents enjoy a warm and familiar environment. We foster a true sense of belonging, where staff and residents become like extended family.




### Can families stay involved in care?


Absolutely. We believe family involvement is essential to a resident's wellbeing. Loved ones are encouraged to visit, participate in activities, and join us for meals. We maintain open communication with families about health updates, daily life, and any changes in care needs, ensuring you are always part of the journey.




### How do we start the conversation about moving?


Starting the conversation is often the hardest step. We suggest beginning with a casual visit to our home for a cup of coffee and a tour. Seeing the warm, social environment firsthand often eases anxiety and opens the door to a positive discussion about the benefits of senior housing independent living in a safe, supportive setting.
















A warm, sunlit home where care meets comfort — Golf View Home provides compassionate assisted living in a safe, personal, and genuinely livable setting.

## Step Inside a Maris Grove Senior Living Community Alternative — Golf View Home

URL: https://www.golf-view-home.com/about
Description: Meet the heart behind Golf View Home, a trusted alternative to a maris grove senior living community. Learn how our family-oriented Brentwood residence redefines compassionate care for your loved one.

Step Inside a Maris Grove Senior Living Community Alternative — Golf View Home






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Living & Care
- About the Residence



Contact










# A Place to Call Home, Where Every Story Matters


At Golf View Home, we believe that the best senior care begins with a sense of belonging. Nestled in the heart of Brentwood, our residence is designed not as a facility, but as a true home—a place where warmth, dignity, and personal connection shape every moment. We understand that transitioning to assisted living is a profound journey for both seniors and their families, and our mission is to make that journey feel less like a move and more like a homecoming.


For families seeking 24 hour care for seniors, our approach bridges the gap between independent living and the reassurance of round-the-clock support, all within the familiar comforts of a residential neighborhood.

















## Our Home, Your Comfort



At Golf View Home, we've designed every space to feel warm, familiar, and safe. Our amenities are built around the rhythm of daily life, ensuring residents enjoy the practical comforts and gentle social connections that make a house a home.










### Comfortable Bedrooms


Private and semi-private suites bathed in natural Brentwood light, designed for restful sleep with accessible layouts and room for personal treasures that make the space truly yours.









### Shared Living Spaces


Inviting common areas where residents gather for conversation, games, or simply watching the garden. These sunlit rooms are the heart of our community, fostering friendship and belonging.









### Meals & Dining


Nutritious, home-cooked meals prepared fresh daily and served family-style in our welcoming dining room. We accommodate dietary needs with care, making every meal a moment of comfort and connection.









### Secure Environment


Thoughtful safety features, 24-hour staffing, and secure outdoor access provide peace of mind for families. Our residents enjoy independence within a protected, caring setting that offers 24 hour care for seniors.









### Outdoor Relaxation


Landscaped gardens, shaded patios, and walking paths invite residents to enjoy fresh air and California sunshine. These serene outdoor areas are perfect for quiet reflection or visiting with loved ones.









### Housekeeping Support


Regular housekeeping and laundry services free residents from daily chores, allowing them to focus on hobbies, social activities, and the simple pleasures of each day.








Every morning, the smell of fresh coffee drifts from the kitchen, and the sound of friendly chatter fills the halls. This is more than a residence — it's the gentle, reassuring rhythm of home.














## Inside the Home


At Golf View Home, every room is designed to feel bright, familiar, and safe. From the sun-filled living areas to the cozy private suites, our residence blends comfort with gentle elegance, creating spaces where seniors truly feel at home.

















































## Confidence in Care, Rooted in Reputation










The compassion and patience the staff shows daily is truly remarkable. My mother feels genuinely cared for, not just supervised. It's the closest thing to family care we could find.



Family Member

Compassion








Cleanliness and safety standards here exceed every facility we toured. The home is immaculate, the meals are nutritious, and the attention to detail gives us incredible peace of mind.

Cleanliness

Peace of Mind





We invite you to speak directly with our families. Personal connections build lasting trust.














332 Pebble Beach Dr. , Brentwood, CA, 94513, US


## Rooted in Brentwood, California



Golf View Home is nestled in the heart of Brentwood, a city known for its peaceful suburban charm, tree-lined streets, and strong sense of community. Our location offers the perfect balance of quiet residential living and convenient access to local amenities. Families find comfort knowing their loved ones are in a neighborhood that feels like home, with nearby parks, medical facilities, and familiar local shops just minutes away.


For seniors seeking 24 hour care for seniors in a setting that doesn't feel institutional, Brentwood provides a backdrop of warm California sunshine and genuine neighborly connection. It's a place where independence is supported and dignity is preserved.


- 332 Pebble Beach Dr. , Brentwood, CA, 94513, US

- 332 Pebble Beach Dr. , Brentwood, CA, 94513, US

- Familiar local shops, cafes, and community gathering spots

- Easy access for family visits and outings

Start a Conversation About Senior Housing Independent Living — Golf View Home

# We'd Love to Hear From You


Reach out to discuss your family's care needs, learn about current availability, and schedule a personal tour of our Brentwood home. We're here to guide you through every step of the process with compassion and clarity.


Our team is available to answer your questions and help you explore the best options for your loved one.









### Give Us a Call



Speak directly with our care team to discuss your questions and schedule a visit at your convenience.








### Send Us a Message



Prefer to write? Email us anytime with your inquiries, and we'll respond promptly with the information you need.
















## Start the conversation


We're here to answer your questions about senior living at Golf View Home. Tell us a little about what you're looking for, and we'll be in touch within one business day.




Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy




Send Message










## Personalized guidance for your family


Choosing the right senior care is a deeply personal decision. At Golf View Home, we approach every conversation with respect, patience, and the understanding that you need clear answers — not sales pressure. Our team is here to listen first.









### Timely, thoughtful responses


We respond to every inquiry within one business day, often sooner. You won't be left waiting when you have urgent questions about 24 hour care for seniors.










### Your privacy is respected


All information you share is kept strictly confidential. We never sell or distribute your personal details to third parties.










### Real conversation, not a script


We treat every family as unique. Expect a warm, personalized reply that addresses your specific situation and questions about independent living senior care.



















## Plan Your Visit to Golf View Home


We encourage families to visit and experience the warm, home-like atmosphere of our Brentwood residence. Seeing our community in person is the best way to understand how we provide personalized care in a safe, comforting environment.









### Prepare Your Questions


Write down any questions about daily routines, medical support, meals, and activities. Our team is happy to address every detail to help you feel confident in your decision.










### Discuss Care Needs


Share your loved one's specific needs and preferences with our care team. We'll explain how our personalized approach supports both physical well-being and emotional comfort.










### Feel the Atmosphere


Take time to observe the daily rhythm of our home — the interactions between residents and staff, the comfort of the common areas, and the genuine sense of community that defines Golf View Home.


























## Find the right fit with confidence


Choosing the right care for a loved one is one of the most important decisions a family can make. At Golf View Home, we invite you to reach out directly so we can answer your questions, share more about our approach, and help you feel at ease with every step ahead.















A warm, sunlit home where care meets comfort — Golf View Home provides compassionate assisted living in a safe, personal, and genuinely livable setting.

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

- Living & Care

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/3/2026



Golf View Home ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website https://golf-view-home.zappy5.app ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Golf View Home

- Email: lorica.hipolito@yahoo.com

- Phone: +15102192325

- Address: 332 Pebble Beach Dr. , Brentwood, CA, 94513, US



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://www.golf-view-home.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Living & Care
- About the Residence



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 3, 2026



Golf View Home is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Golf View Home

- Email: lorica.hipolito@yahoo.com

- Phone: +15102192325



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 3, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Golf View Home

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Senior Care / Assisted Living provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Golf View Home provides Senior Care / Assisted Living through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Golf View Home. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Golf View Home

- Email: lorica.hipolito@yahoo.com

- Phone: +15102192325

- Address: 332 Pebble Beach Dr. , Brentwood, CA, 94513, US
